landing.title: OpenFarmPlanner
landing.statusLine: Active beta • continuous improvement • feedback welcome
landing.headline: Digital crop planning for vegetable farming — clear, practical, and continuously improved.
landing.subtitle: For vegetable farms, CSA, and small agricultural teams.
landing.description: Plan crops, areas, and timelines in one place. OpenFarmPlanner brings structure to daily planning and is continuously refined with user feedback.

heroHighlights.title: What you can plan right away

items.cultureManagement: Manage crops in a structured way

featureOverview.title: Planning without spreadsheet chaos
featureOverview.subtitle: Core functions are built for quick orientation and daily practical use.

cultureManagement.title: Crops at a glance
cultureManagement.description: Capture and maintain all relevant crop data in one place.

fieldPlanning.title: Areas clearly assigned
fieldPlanning.description: Plan and document fields and beds in a traceable way.

timePlanning.title: Structured timelines
timePlanning.description: Map sowing, planting, and further steps across clear time periods.

projectCollaboration.title: Work together effectively
projectCollaboration.description: Keep projects transparent and share planning context with your team.

statusNote: OpenFarmPlanner is in active beta and continuously improved.

feedback.title: Feedback, ideas, and bug reports
feedback.description: Your input directly helps us prioritize upcoming improvements.

items.bugReports: Bug reports and unclear workflow notes

openSource.title: Open source as a trust signal
openSource.description: OpenFarmPlanner is developed in the open. Source code is public, progress is transparent, and contributions are welcome.

items.issues: Issues for questions, ideas, and bugs
items.contributions: Contributions via pull requests are welcome

finalCta.title: Try OpenFarmPlanner
finalCta.description: Start planning right away or register to join the ongoing product development.

footer.brandText: Calm, transparent, and practical crop planning in active development.
footer.contactText: For questions, feedback, and reports, reach out via email.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.disclaimer: These details are based on the current draft status (March 2026). Please complete legal review before going live.

controller.title: Controller
controller.content:
Responsible for data processing on this website:

Martin Stipsitz
Burgenlandstraße 44A / 9
9500 Villach
Austria

Email: info@openfarmplanner.org

generalNotice.title: General information on data processing
generalNotice.content:
We take the protection of your personal data seriously. We process your data confidentially and in accordance with applicable data protection laws and this privacy policy.

Using OpenFarmPlanner is generally possible without providing personal data. If personal data is collected (for example during registration), this is done on a voluntary basis.

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content:
This website is hosted by:

Uberspace GmbH
Kaiserstraße 15
55116 Mainz
Germany

When you visit the website, the server automatically records:

bullets.requestTime: Date and time of the request

registration.title: Registration and user account
registration.content: To use OpenFarmPlanner, you can create a user account. The following data may be processed:
registration.legalBasis: Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract)

projectData.title: Project and application data
projectData.content: Within the application, users can store the following data:

emailCommunication.title: Email communication
emailCommunication.content: We use your email address for:

logFiles.title: Log files
logFiles.content: Technical log files are stored to ensure reliable operation. These may include:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: OpenFarmPlanner uses technically necessary cookies to ensure core functionality.

dataSharing.title: Data sharing
dataSharing.content: Your data is not shared with third parties, except where necessary for contractual performance or where legally required.

storageDuration.title: Storage duration
storageDuration.content: Your data is stored as long as your user account exists. You can request account deletion at any time.

complaint.title: Right to lodge a complaint
complaint.content:
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the data protection authority:

Austrian Data Protection Authority
Barichgasse 40-42
1030 Vienna
https://www.dsb.gv.at

changes.title: Changes to this privacy policy
changes.content: We reserve the right to adjust this privacy policy to reflect new features or legal requirements.
